name: Marie Whofes — Try To Be Something New To Her.
description:
Of course you know who Marie Whofes is, right? No?! You don’t know the Genius, Millionaire, Socialite, Philanthropist, Heir of the family Whofes?

She also hides a little secret, it has something to do with the moon... Maybe? (That’s the base image that gave me the idea.)
creator: GarfoNaTomada
